name: set_max_time_borrow
full_help:
set_max_time_borrow

Description: 
Limit time borrowing for latches

Syntax: 
set_max_time_borrow  [-quiet] [-verbose] <delay> <objects>

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <delay>     Delay value: Value >= 0
  <objects>   List of clocks, cells, data pins or clock pins

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
